scripts.remove_merged: git branch --merged | grep -Ev '(^\*|main|master)' | xargs git branch -d
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:test:seed: cd backend && NODE_ENV=test npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:deploy_generate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test:coverage:all: concurrently "cd backend && npx vitest --coverage" "cd frontend && npx vitest --coverage"
